message:
fix: gateway and MCS installation banners and error handling (#9472)

- Make Gateway API and MCS installation banners conditional on isDemoData
  so they only show when no real CRD data is detected
- Make quick install command sections conditional on isDemoData
- Add error state handling to ServiceExports card with retry button,
  matching the pattern used by GatewayStatus and ServiceImports

Fixes #9470

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
